passes_defended_per_game_z.limits: Safeties in zone may have fewer PDs than those in man. Scheme-dependent.

interceptions_per_game_z.limits: Low frequency. Safeties in deep zone get more INT opportunities than box safeties.

solo_tackle_rate_z.what: Solo tackles as % of total tackles
solo_tackle_rate_z.limits: Box safeties tackle more but may have lower solo rates due to gang tackling near the LOS.

tackles_per_snap_z.limits: High tackle rates for a safety can mean receivers are catching the ball in their zone (mixed signal).

tfl_per_game_z.limits: More common for box safeties who play near the LOS.

forced_fumbles_per_game_z.limits: Very rare. One big hit dominates career rates.

man_coverage_epa_z.what: THEORETICAL: Average EPA allowed on pass plays when this safety is on the field in man coverage
man_coverage_epa_z.how: EPA on man coverage pass plays where this safety was on the field / number of such plays. Inverted so positive z = fewer points allowed. Requires 30+ man coverage pass snaps.
man_coverage_epa_z.limits: ⚠️ TIER 4 — THEORETICAL. We know the team was in man and this safety was playing, but NOT who they were covering. Only 2023-2024 data.

man_coverage_comp_pct_z.what: THEORETICAL: Completion % on pass plays when this safety is on the field in man coverage
man_coverage_comp_pct_z.how: Completions / attempts on man coverage plays where this safety was on the field. Inverted. Requires 30+ snaps.
man_coverage_comp_pct_z.limits: ⚠️ TIER 4 — Same caveats. A completion anywhere on the field counts. Only 2023-2024.
